summary: Added and repaired a receiving-Site Remote Candidate Exchange fixture using the generic narada.remote_candidate.message.v0 shape, with a site-inbox adapter test proving pending cloud candidates remain inert before local admission, accepted/rejected/deferred-error receipts are finalized from local evidence, and duplicate replay does not reapply local admission.

verification.command: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('docs/product/fixtures/remote-candidate-exchange/receiving-site-admission.json','utf8')); console.log('remote candidate receiving fixture json ok')"
re-run after generic candidate fixture repair: node fixture parse, pnpm --filter @narada2/site-inbox test, typecheck, build

residuals: A live receiving Site pull/admit/finalize runtime loop remains later work.
The fixture models deferred admission as retryable finalization error evidence; a first-class deferred remote candidate status remains future contract work if needed.
